title: Ultimate Conduits
description: Adds ultimate tier conduits for Ender IO with unlimited transfer rates. Supports Items, Fluids, Energy, and Mekanism Chemicals!
body:
# Ultimate Conduits

**Ultimate Conduits** is an addon for Ender IO that introduces the absolute highest tier of conduits, designed for extreme end-game automation and massive factories. Say goodbye to bottlenecks and transfer limits!

## ✨ Features
This mod adds "Ultimate" versions of the following conduits, all featuring **UNLIMITED transfer rates (Instant transfer / 0-tick delay)**:

* ⚡ **Ultimate Energy Conduit:** Transfers infinite FE/t. Perfect for power-hungry machines and massive energy storage setups.
* 💧 **Ultimate Fluid Conduit:** Transfers infinite mB/t.
* 📦 **Ultimate Item Conduit:** Instantaneous item transportation.
* ☢️ **Ultimate Chemical Conduit:** Full support for **Mekanism** chemicals (Gases, Infuse Types, Pigments, Slurries)! Transfer your Mekanism processing lines at infinite speeds within a single Ender IO block space. *(Mekanism is an optional dependency; the mod works perfectly fine without it!)*

## ⚙️ Requirements
* **Ender IO** (Required)
* **Mekanism** (Optional, but highly recommended to use the chemical conduits)

## 📜 Credits & License
* The textures used in this mod are modified/recolored versions of the original Ender IO assets. All credit and immense respect for the original beautiful designs go to the **Ender IO development team (SleepyTrousers)**. 
* This mod is an independent addon built with deep respect for their foundational work.
* Released under the MIT License.
